---
title: "Outlier and Influential Points"
description: "Flag outliers and influential points with studentized residuals, leverage, and Cook's distance."
categories: [Regression, Diagnostics]
---

::: {.callout-note title="Introduction"}
Screen a fitted model for outliers and high-influence observations before
relying on its coefficients.
:::

```{r}
#| message: false
#uses patient data

# patient data + model carried over from the Added Variable Plot task
library(car)
patient <- read.table("../../data/CH06PR15.txt", header=TRUE)
gfit2 <- lm(Satisfaction ~ Age + Severity + Anxiety, data=patient)

# visual check for outliers (none should be found)
studres <- rstudent(gfit2)
plot(studres, pch=18, col='red', main="Studentized Residuals")
abline(h=0)

# identify 3 points with highest leverage (none should be found to be high)
# informally 0.5 is considered as a threshold for high leverage points
z <- hatvalues(gfit2)
sort(z, decreasing=TRUE)[1]
sort(z, decreasing=TRUE)[2]
sort(z, decreasing=TRUE)[3]

# check Cook's Distance for influential points (none should be found)
# Use F(0.5,p,n-p) as cutoff for influential point in Cook's distance.
library(lindia)
gg_cooksd(gfit2)
cutoff <- qf(.5, 4, 42)
```


## See also

- [Added Variable Plot](added-variable-plot.qmd)
- [Multiple Linear Regression](multiple-linear-regression.qmd)

*Data: `CH06PR15.txt` — see [sources & provenance](../../data/README.md#regression).*
